title: Update README with Author Information
description: Add the author's name and relevant details to the project's README file as per standard open source conventions.
details: Open the README.md file at the project root. Insert an 'Author' section near the end (or in the appropriate place if a contributors/credits section exists). Include the author's full name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to their profile (GitHub, email, etc.), following markdown formatting best practices. Ensure the section is clearly labeled and consistent with the rest of the document.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a markdown viewer to ensure the author section appears correctly formatted and contains accurate information. Verify that no other parts of the README are unintentionally altered.
